feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Master Data Governance
feed.subtitle: SAP Master Data Governance Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Validation Badi is not triggering for delete, Block/unblock/ mart for deletion scenarios
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

 

Could you please let me know ur inputs validation badi is not triggering Delete, Block/Unblock/ Mark for deletion scenarios in SAP MDG

entry.title: Highlight Changes in DRADBASIC in addition to MATERIAL
entry.content:
Hi,

We have highlight changes enabled for entity type MATERIAL and color is visible for all the field value changes. In addition, we are using DRADBASIC which is also use type 1. Highlight changes does not get enabled for DRADBASIC as it is also type 1. Could someone suggest any method to enable highlight changes for DRADBASIC as well, in addition to MATERIAL.

#mdg

Thank you!

entry.title: Address Information Gets Deleted
entry.content:
There are a set of customers that get the following fields completely deleted after they were processed in Start Mass Processing:

Street; City; Postal Code; Region(Province/State); Phone/Fax Number

What's interesting is that our customers are Canadian partners, and when this error occurs, the country code gets switched to US, and sometimes a US phone number gets populated (the phone string exceeds 10 characters and contains special characters such as dashes (-) and parentheses).

Anybody have a similar experience or is aware of this problem?

entry.title: MDG Consolidation - material activation CR types
entry.content:
Hi,

In configuration activities for master data consolidation, I am trying to "configure activation for material". Not all change request types are appearing in the drop down to select CR type for option "activation via CR type".

Observation - only CR types which have business activity MATB are appearing in the selection dropdown.

Question: Are there any restrictions on the type of Change Requests which you can use with consolidation "activation with change request"?

Tried to search in standard documentation and couldn't found any restrictions mentioned and the standard help for this config activity does mention both single-object and multi-object CR. Based on standard documentation I did remove the enhancement checks from step 00.

Any suggestions would be appreciated.

Thanks

Anuj

entry.title: Custom UIBB data does not get saved in staging table
entry.content:
Good day,
We are creating a custom UIBB in MDG masterdata.
The data doesn't get saved in the staging table.
The UIBB developped in SE80 are not visible in Wiring.

Saving data issue steps to reproduce:
1/ Go to MDG Supplier tile.
2/ On supplier search page, click on "search button".
3/ Select a supplier in the list and open supplier profile in a new tab.
4/ Click on the "edit" button
5/ Go to ERP Vendor section and click on "Details" button to access content of the ERP vendor section.
6/ In the ERP vendor section, go to the new custom UIBB, click on "edit", enter data in the fields, click on "done".
7/ New callback answer field gets emptied. Data doesn't get saved in the staging table.

Hypothesis:
We think the problem is our custom UIBB is not getting detected in Wiring.
We already implemented custom UIBBs in the past, and our past UIBB are seen in that list.
See screenshot below for examples of past custom UIBBs showing in the Wiring.
Our new custom UIBB is highlighed in blue and it is not visible in the Wiring, the old custom UIBBs (fully functional) are highlighted in yellow and they are visible in the Wiring.

 


This is the error message we are getting in design mode.
"Exception occured in program/class CL_WDR_CONTEXT_NODE_INFO include/method IF_WD_CONTEXT_NODE_INFO~ADD_NEW_CHILD_NODE line 11
The name contains invalid characters, valid characters are A-Z, 0-9, _, and /.
Error at instantiation of component FPM_LIST_UIBB_ATS with config ID ZFPM_SP_CB_UI
Connector class CL_BS_BP_CONNECTOR_BOL_REL does not match model namespace"

We found a note 1460377 that could fix the error message from above.
But we are unable to download note 1460377 because this note is not meant for our current SAP version 756.
Any similar note we could download that would be applicable for SAP version 756 ?

Any idea of where we are going wrong ?
Any help is greatly appreciated as we must deliver this evolution within the next 5 days.
Thanks a lot in advance.

entry.title: SAP Master Data Governance
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm puzzled with a customer inquiry regarding governance of Product Hierarchies (Material master maintained via MDG UI).

Instead of directly adding prodduct hierarchies  in SAP table , whenever any hierarchy has to be created or updated. It has to be created or updated through MDG UI (NWBC) and governed.

How to manage those Hierarchies in one level in MDG Screen ( NWBC)

Anybody familiar with this topic able to provide some solution ?

Any feedback appreciated!

entry.title: NWBC Error
entry.content:
Hi All, While trying to upload the materials for plant extension the CR number is not getting generated and the error as below Material XXX123 exist in active area; Material overwritten Message no. MDG_MAT_LOADER_MSG025

#SAPMDG @masterdatagovernance @MDGS

entry.title: EDIT of Service Group for Business Partner in SOAMANAGER
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have created the service group for SOAMANAGER few years before for Business Partner in MDG.

Integration happens between MDG to CRM system. 

We just want to change the EDIT the service group of Business partner in the Sender system and receving system too.

Kindly let me know how do we edit the object without deleting this service group.

We just want to change the updated password and do ping test between the system.

Regards,

KArthik S

entry.title: SAP MDGF FRS item replication error
entry.content:
Dear Users,

We are in the process of implementing FRS for a client who is using MDG to ECC HUB deployment, During replication using SOA method of FRS item, we are facing the following issu

Item 'y' not (or no longer)in version 'xxxx' after update. (seen in srt_moni)

This is not allowing us to replicate the FRS. can anyone please advise how we can find a resolution to this issue. any help will be much Appreciated. Thank you.

entry.title: MDG-M Autoapprove Step if no approver found
entry.content:
Hi!

We are using Dynmic agent call badi to dynamically retrieve approvers. Some steps are conditional and depends on Custom fields. So Badi checks if step applies or not. 

We need that if step is not applicable->got autoapproved or follow to next step. How to set auto-approval and continue to next step? ( if no approver set in badi, workflow get stuck). How to skit step and go to next ?

 

Thanks!

entry.title: How to Abort Data Services Job Programatically ?
entry.content:
We have a Data Services job that "hangs" now and then, and never ends. In SQL Table  "AL_HISTORY" the column  "END_TIME" is NULL.

Is there a way I can programmatically identify this "hung" job, and create a process to automatically abort it, without a user having to abort it manually ?

PS. Is there a better place to post this question ? This was the best I could find.

entry.title: Restricting the scope of a SAP MDG DQM Data Quality rule to a selected CR Type and CR Step number
entry.content:
Dear SAP MDG SAP Data Quality Management gurus,

Is there a way to restrict a scope of a Data Quality rule to specific CR Types and CR Step numbers? This used to be possible when configuring a rule through BRF+ (Validations and Derivations menu), however, I can't seem to find the same option in DQM. 

I know there are "Change Request" and "Step Number" fields available in the Evaluation Context structure when defining a scope. However, these don't seem to restrict the scope to a CR Type (at least not in my test). 

Any suggestions?

entry.title: Error while starting Mass processing
entry.content: Hi Experts, Im getting below error while starting load using Mass processing for BP. Can't find any relevant OSS note either. Let me know if any one has come across this error.

entry.title: Recap Screen after MDG Change Request
entry.content:
Hi, I am in MDG system and I need to show a simple screen with a checks list that users have done when they click  button SUBMIT of change request. I have my dialog screen with a structure in a FPM_LIST_UIBB_ATS component and I re-implemented the method CL_FPM~RAISE_EVENT method to open my dialog box.

me->core_object->if_fpm~open_dialog_box( 'PAGE_2' ).

Something get wrong when I open my dialog screen because the work flow doesn't start, I can click on the submit button, I can see the dialog box with the checks list but the WF doesn't start. If I comment the row and I don't open the dialog the WF starts correctly.

In addition I should take the list of checked controls and I should add a note to the CR.

entry.title: Advice regarding Central Hub deployment SAP MDG
entry.content:
Hi,

I am soon going to implement SAP MDG central hub deployment. I have few question regarding the approach. Customer wants to implement basic Business Partner model first.

Customer has already implemented SAP MDG-F financial data models which is co deployment of MDG on HANA. Customer now wants to move to Central Hub approach. My questions are as below.

1. First step I am thinking is to implement very basic BP data model solution with no enhancement at all. For out of box configuration, do I just need to activate BP data model or even data model for Customer or Vendor ? Like when I activate business functions do I need to activate just for business partners or even customer or vendors ?

2. In MDG Hub scenario what is the best way to keep baseline config of target system in sync with MDG Hub ? I guess I will need basic config available in MDG Hub to create business partners. 

3. Customer is already using SOA replication and want to use same for Hub approach. Do you see any challenges with this approach ? What is the best recommended method for replication ?

4. I am also planning to use Consolidation for initial data load so that I get advantage of match and best record features. Does it sounds good idea ?

5. Once MDG hub is implemented then what will be the best way to bring co deployed finance data model also on Hub ?

6. In general what are the important things to take care in such project ? Please share any lessons learnt ?

entry.title: Hello experts, need help with finding the cost of the material.
Legacy Data Migration-Materials & MDG
entry.content:
Dear All,

I tried to find an answer for my question in the forum but no luck.  Therefore submitting my request / question related to Data Migration w.r.t. SAP MDG.

We have a plan where we want to migrate legacy material master data into S4H 2022 and later on want to make SAP MDG (Co-deployment) as the only way to create, change etc., of material master data.

Q1. Will it be possible to edit an single material or multiple materials (Mass) update or change from MDG (which are directly uploaded into the S4H initially)?

Q2. In the similar lines what about BP Master too.

Thanks for your inputs.

Regards,

Ramana Rao.

entry.title: MDG Change Request icon
entry.content:
Hi, I am on MDG and I have a GUIBB LIST component view with Change Request column displayed as "link to action" with icon "In Progress" to link my entity to a possible change request of another entity.

When I open my entity in display mode I see the default image but I need to display it only if there is an open change request, when I clink on Edit button I have implemented the BAdI in order to change the field properties and I can hide the image when there aren't any change request to link.

Is there a BAdI where I can change that image in according with a condition based on the value of that column? Eg. If value is 000000 no display otherwise I have to display the icon

Thank you and regards

Antonio

entry.title: Key Mapping in SAP MDGF
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have   MDG hub system with 5 target system, I need to load the data from target system to MDGF hub system and also key mapping to be maintained.

Could you please let me know how can we achieve this.

Is there any documents or comments would be more helpfull.

entry.title: How to to key Mapping for SAP MDGF
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Could you please if there are any step by step document for Key Mapping in SAP MDG.
